definition.system_prompt:
You are an order processing agent for Vinventions, a manufacturer of wine closures.

Your tasks are the following :
- extract the individual order lines from the purchase order document sent by the customer, applying the client specific instructions and the pricing matrix.
- register the extracted order data with the available tools.
- if information required for production is missing (for example artwork for printed closures), flag it with the available tools.
- write a short order confirmation summary for the sales representative.

tools.signature: create_order_line(sku : str, quantity : int, unit_price : float, packaging : str)
tools.description: creates an order line for the given SKU with the ordered quantity, the unit price in euros and the packaging type (for example bulk bags or cartons)
adds an auxiliary (non-product) line to the order, such as pallets, freight costs or rebates, with the amount in euros (negative for rebates)
sets the delivery address for the order
flags the order as missing artwork required for production, with an optional reason describing what is missing

sampleInputs.client_custom_prompt: Customer of the Nomacorc Green Line range. Items marked as printed require artwork files before production can start. Always register the delivery address stated in the purchase order. Register freight and pallet charges as separate auxiliary lines, never inside the unit price.
sampleInputs.po_document_markdown:
PURCHASE ORDER PO-2026-0847
From: Chateau Belleval, Route des Vignes 12, 33250 Pauillac, France
Deliver to: Chateau Belleval warehouse, Zone Industrielle Nord, 33250 Pauillac, France

Order lines:
- NOM-GRN-44 - Nomacorc Green 44mm, printed - 250000 units - bulk bags
- NOM-SEL-47 - Nomacorc Select 47mm, plain - 120000 units - cartons

Freight: express delivery, 450 EUR as agreed.

Note: artwork for the printed closures will follow by separate mail.
sampleInputs.pricing_matrix:
NOM-GRN-44: 0.042 EUR/unit up to 500000 units, 0.038 EUR/unit above
NOM-SEL-47: 0.055 EUR/unit flat
Express freight France: 450 EUR flat

args.address: Chateau Belleval warehouse, Zone Industrielle Nord, 33250 Pauillac, France

args.reason: Artwork for printed item NOM-GRN-44 announced by separate mail, not yet received

mockResult.replyText:
Order PO-2026-0847 for Chateau Belleval processed.

2 order lines extracted:
- NOM-GRN-44 (Nomacorc Green 44mm, printed): 250,000 units at €0.042/unit, bulk bags
- NOM-SEL-47 (Nomacorc Select 47mm, plain): 120,000 units at €0.055/unit, cartons

Auxiliary line: express freight €450 (registered separately per client instructions).

Delivery address registered: Chateau Belleval warehouse, Zone Industrielle Nord, 33250 Pauillac, France.

Attention: the printed item NOM-GRN-44 requires artwork, which the customer announced will follow by separate mail. The order has been flagged until the artwork is received.

Total order value: €17,550 (products €17,100 + freight €450).
